 Perform trilinear interpolation inside a cube.
 
int ErfcLookupTable (std::string filename, double maxRe, double maxIm, double incRe, double incIm)
 Generate and save a text lookup table for cerfc over a complex grid.
 
int ErfcLookupTableBin (std::string filename, double maxRe, double maxIm, double incRe, double incIm)
 Generate and save a binary lookup table for cerfc over a complex grid.
 

Detailed Description

Header file of the class that provides auxiliary mathematical functionalities for the SIE solver.

These include:

  • Lookup table management classes for complex-valued functions
  • Special functions (erf/erfc, exponential integral)
  • Factorials and dyadic algebra
  • Symmetry operations (translations)
  • Interpolation templates (linear, bilinear, trilinear)
  • Table generators for error-function lookups (text and binary)

Definition in file mathFunctions.h.

◆ ErfcLookupTable()

int ErfcLookupTable ( std::string filename,
double maxRe,
double maxIm,
double incRe,
double incIm )

Generate and save a text lookup table for cerfc over a complex grid.

Parameters
filenameOutput text file name.
maxReMaximum real value of the grid.
maxImMaximum imaginary value of the grid.
incReIncrement along the real axis.
incImIncrement along the imaginary axis.
Returns
0 on success, nonzero on failure.

◆ FillGreenTable()

template<class Type>
void FillGreenTable ( rvec r,
rvec rp,
Type(* greenFunction )(rvec, rvec) )

Evaluate a Green's function at given source and observation points.

Template Parameters
TypeReturn type of the Green's function (e.g., complex or scalar).
Parameters
rObservation point.
rpSource point.
greenFunctionPointer to the Green's function to evaluate.

Prints the evaluated Green's function value to standard output.

Perform bilinear interpolation on a rectangular surface.

Template Parameters
TypeData type of interpolated values.
Parameters
x0,y0,i0Coordinates and value of first vertex.
x1,i1Coordinates and value of second vertex.
x2,i2Coordinates and value of third vertex.
x3,y3,i3Coordinates and value of fourth vertex.
xp,ypQuery coordinates inside the quadrilateral.
Returns
Interpolated value at (xp, yp).

Perform trilinear interpolation inside a cube.

Template Parameters
TypeData type of interpolated values.
Parameters
x0,y0,z0,i0Coordinates and value of the 1st cube corner.
x1,y1,i1Coordinates and value of the 2nd cube corner.

x3,y3,i3Coordinates and value of the 4th cube corner.

x6,y6,i6Coordinates and value of the 7th cube corner.
x7,y7,i7Coordinates and value of the 8th cube corner.

Returns
Interpolated value at (xp, yp, zp).
